vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

generated_parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
generated_parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

verify.rule: Blueprint XPU must output a complete blueprint schema.
Blueprint must include a mass budget and verify.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.
Each internal_feature_target in P0 must appear as a part_tree child and geometry_ops id or target.
Adjacent interfaces must have reciprocal connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.
Critical joints must state locking method and torque/preload intent.
verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to uneven heat dissipation from motor and drive.
risk.mit: Implement a heat sink or cooling fins on the base plate.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to insufficient strain relief.
risk.mit: Add strain relief geometry at cable entry point.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence in cad_brief.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening fasteners leading to joint failure.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and use calibrated tools during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate stiffness in the base plate.
risk.mit: Review and possibly increase the thickness of the base plate.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.description: Transmits payload and arm mass to the base.
Rotary motion from motor to joint.
Heat dissipation from motor and drive to base plate.
Cable entry for motor and drive power and control.

verification_focus.description: Verify the base plate can handle the payload and arm mass.
Verify the harmonic drive can transmit the required torque.
Verify the base plate can dissipate the heat generated by the motor and drive.
Verify the cable entry allows for proper routing and strain relief.

risk.desc: Cable routing through center bore may cause interference with internal components.

risk.desc: High torque requirements may lead to premature wear of harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Select materials and lubricants that can handle high torque.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around moving joints may cause jamming.
risk.mit: Ensure all moving joints have adequate clearance.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools and procedures.

risk.desc: The tool flange may not be robust enough to handle the 5-50Nm torque range without additional reinforcement.
risk.mit: Review the tool flange design and add reinforcement ribs if necessary.

risk.desc: The harmonic drive may require additional cooling to prevent overheating during high cycle operations.
risk.mit: Evaluate the thermal management plan and consider adding a heat sink or active cooling system.

risk.desc: The cable spine may not have sufficient slack to avoid pinch points during joint rotation.
risk.mit: Review cable routing and ensure there is adequate slack and strain relief at all joints.

risk.desc: The shoulder flange may not provide enough clearance for assembly and disassembly.
risk.mit: Increase the clearance around the shoulder flange to ensure easy access for maintenance.

risk.desc: The bearing seat may not have sufficient preload to maintain proper alignment during operation.
risk.mit: Evaluate the preload requirements and ensure the bearing seat design can accommodate the necessary preload.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
physics_paths: power_channel: motor power lines run separately from signal lines to prevent interference
signal_channel: sensor and encoder signal lines run in dedicated channels for noise reduction
ground_point: each electronics module has a clear grounding scheme with signal returns routed alongside signals
thermal_inspection_window: allows for thermal inspection of internal components without disassembly
